title: Beam Global Receives First Order for BeamSpot EV Chargers from Fortune 500 Company
text: Beam Global received the first order for its BeamSpot curbside chargers from a Fortune 500 company in the utility and energy solutions sector. Multiple corporate offices each plan to install three BeamSpot systems for EV charging and street lighting. The BeamSpot system is a patented sustainable curbside electric vehicle charging infrastructure system that combines solar, wind and utility-generated electricity into Beam Global's proprietary integrated batteries to provide resiliency, lighting and curbside EV charging. BeamSpot products are intended for public use in areas where EV charging is needed most but traditional installation methods are most challenging, including on-street parking environments, communities with multi-unit housing and public access complexes such as shopping centers, airports, event centers, stadiums and amusement parks. This represents a significant milestone for the newly launched BeamSpot product line and validates market demand for innovative curbside charging solutions.
